description: A still styled to resemble a frame from a historical war film, with a chromatic-aberration filter at the edges. A man with long hair tied back, wearing a colonial-era leather vest and white shirt, carries a furled early American flag with a circle of stars on a blue field while moving across a dry grassy field. A dark text box near the bottom reads 'SEND THEM BACK' with smaller text below reading 'JOIN.ICE.GOV'.
